problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeEnablementWitness defines the runtime enablement evidence boundary, but operators still need a public-safe request that names missing evidence without serializing secrets or enabling runtime authority.
success_criteria: the operator input request schema validates with required input and blocked action lists
the emitter derives required evidence names from the runtime enablement witness remaining-denied refs
the validator rejects runtime enablement authority drift, execution drift, secret marker drift, malformed payloads, and invalid witness-state drift
runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, terminal closure, connector calls, and success claims remain denied
non_goals: do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not serialize secret values or external account credentials
do not claim terminal closure or runtime success
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
the request may serialize evidence names and next actions only
all effect-bearing worker runtime actions remain blocked
